instruction: Write a FreeMarker template that builds a two-column feature grid by iterating `features` and wrapping every odd-indexed item in a new row div. Each feature map has `title` and `summary`. Escape both fields.
code:
<#-- Model: features: sequence of maps { title, summary } -->
<#list features![] as feature> <#if feature?index % 2 == 0>

${feature.title?html}

${feature.summary?html}

<#if feature?index % 2 == 1 || !feature?has_next>
